message:
fix: update AlertListItem test to use role selector after DOM nesting fix (#10386)

The DOM nesting fix (#10382) moved the click handler from the outer
container to an inner div[role="button"]. Update the test to query by
role instead of class selector.

Fixes #10384

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
